item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm a huge fan of this, I just want there to be more. Like someone else said an experiment log, a retrieval log of the first time the foundation encountered these, or even an exploration log of an enormous nest in the wild? I know those are overdone but I think more content could only help this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very detailed SCP. I enjoyed it as a whole, but I think it would've been really great with an experiment on a D-class or some sort of log on accidental exposure that was then quarantined and observed. As it stands it's more so a detailed account of a dangerous growth which holds a good amount of potential to produce a good story, but falls a bit short.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I went ahead and updated the desc to reference the light requirement :).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: As the light issue has been resolved, the previous comment no longer applies.
